---
reference: inspect_ai.event
description: Transcript events.
---

## Core Events

### ModelEvent
### ToolEvent
### BranchEvent
### CompactionEvent
### ApprovalEvent
### SandboxEvent
### InfoEvent
### ScoreEvent
### LoggerEvent
### ErrorEvent
### SpanBeginEvent
### SpanEndEvent

## Event Tree

### event_tree
### event_tree_walk
### event_sequence
### EventTree
### EventTreeSpan
### EventTreeNode

## Timeline

### timeline_build
### timeline_dump
### timeline_filter
### timeline_load
### timeline_branch
### Timeline
### TimelineEvent
### TimelineSpan
### Outline
### OutlineNode

## Eval Events

### SampleInitEvent
### SampleLimitEvent
### StateEvent
### StoreEvent
### InputEvent

### ScoreEditEvent

## Types

### LoggingLevel
### LoggingMessage
